title: Current Families

contentHtml:
Welcome to Camp Barney Medintz

Whether you are a first-time family or have been part of the Barney tradition for generations, we are thrilled you are a part of the Camp Barney Medintz family.

The moment camp ends, we start looking forward tosummer. Our year-round staff begins planning for an even more memorable summer, and we know our campers begin their countdown to when they can join their friends at CBM.

We encourage all families to visit our Before Camp and During Camp pages for details on all things camp.

We highly recommend you read through our Parent Handbook. It has answers to questions you haven’t even thought about asking!
contentText:
Welcome to Camp Barney Medintz

Whether you are a first-time family or have been part of the Barney tradition for generations, we are thrilled you are a part of the Camp Barney Medintz family.

The moment camp ends, we start looking forward tosummer. Our year-round staff begins planning for an even more memorable summer, and we know our campers begin their countdown to when they can join their friends at CBM.

We encourage all families to visit our 
Before Camp
 and 
During Camp
 pages for details on all things camp.

We highly recommend you read through our 
Parent Handbook
. It has answers to questions you haven’t even thought about asking!
